mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT LOCATION_ID as locationId, BUSINESS_ID as businessId, NAME as name, ZIP_CODE as zipCode, ADDRESS as address, ADDRESS_DETAIL as addressDetail, LATITUDE as latitude, LONGITUDE as longitude, LOCATION_TYPE as locationType, LOCATION_CATEGORY as locationCategory, DESCRIPTION as description, CREATED_AT as createdAt FROM LQ_LOCATION WHERE LATITUDE IS NOT NULL AND LONGITUDE IS NOT NULL
AND ( UPPER(NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{_parameter}) || '%' OR UPPER(ADDRESS) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{_parameter}) || '%' OR UPPER(NVL(ADDRESS_DETAIL, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{_parameter}) || '%' )
ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC, LOCATION_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 50

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT LOCATION_ID as locationId, BUSINESS_ID as businessId, NAME as name, ZIP_CODE as zipCode, ADDRESS as address, ADDRESS_DETAIL as addressDetail, LATITUDE as latitude, LONGITUDE as longitude, LOCATION_TYPE as locationType, LOCATION_CATEGORY as locationCategory, DESCRIPTION as description, CREATED_AT as createdAt FROM LQ_LOCATION WHERE BUSINESS_ID = #{businessId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC, LOCATION_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_LQ_LOCATION_PK.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO LQ_LOCATION ( location_id, business_id, name, zip_code, address, address_detail, latitude, longitude, location_type, location_category, description, created_at ) VALUES ( #{locationId}, #{businessId}, #{name}, #{zipCode}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{locationType}, #{locationCategory}, #{description}, sysdate )

SELECT NVL(MAX(LOCATION_ID), 0) + 1 FROM LQ_LOCATION
INSERT INTO LQ_LOCATION ( location_id, business_id, name, zip_code, address, address_detail, latitude, longitude, location_type, location_category, description, created_at ) VALUES ( #{locationId}, #{businessId}, #{name}, #{zipCode}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{locationType}, #{locationCategory}, #{description}, sysdate )
mapper.update: UPDATE LQ_LOCATION SET BUSINESS_ID = #{businessId}, NAME = #{name}, ZIP_CODE = #{zipCode}, ADDRESS = #{address}, ADDRESS_DETAIL = #{addressDetail}, LOCATION_TYPE = #{locationType}, LOCATION_CATEGORY = #{locationCategory}, DESCRIPTION = #{description} WHERE LOCATION_ID = #{locationId}
mapper.select: SELECT QR_AUTH_KEY FROM LQ_LOCATION_QR WHERE LOCATION_ID = #{_parameter} AND NVL(IS_ACTIVE, 0) = 1 AND ROWNUM = 1
